series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains long-term files related to grant awards. These files may include semi-annual and final programmatic and financial reports, final OCM applications to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) for annual cooperative agreement awards, pass-through grant recipient final reports, performance reports, final project summaries, project photos, post-project documentation, acquisition/construction site reviews, surveys; grantee applications, agreements/contracts, amendments, final plans and specifications, site location map including sign location.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: construction projects: Twenty (20) years start of grant cycle or three (3) years start of grant cycle if an electronic copy is available. acquisition projects: Permanent or three (3) years start of grant cycle if an electronic copy is available. ; Electronic: construction projects: Twenty (20) years start of grant cycle. acquisition projects: Permanent
